title: Risk Flag
description: A single risk flag attached to an engagement · receipt · or agent. Classes mirror CRE due-diligence vocabulary (operational · security · compliance · financial). High-severity flags auto-escalate to a senior validator.

flag_type.description: Specific named risk · e.g., stale_color · seller_motivation_unknown · adversarial_prompt_detected · cost_to_mint_exceeded

auto_escalate.description: True if this flag automatically escalates to a senior validator or human reviewer

subject_id.description: The id of the subject record being flagged

raised_by.description: Rule id · validator id · or human operator
